keys.title: Payment Successful!
keys.linkingWorkspace: Linking your paid workspace to this browser session…
keys.workspaceBlocked: We could not register your workspace from this payment session. Refresh this page while signed in, or contact support with your transaction id.
keys.confirmationEmail: A confirmation and invoice will be sent to {email} from Vouus. You may also receive a receipt from Stripe.
keys.emailMissingHint: Enter your email on Stripe Checkout to receive Vouus billing email, or use Download receipt when available. Stripe may also send its own receipt.
keys.receiptEmailHint: Receipt link will appear in your confirmation email if not shown here.
keys.needHelp: Need help? Contact our support team at
